pi_items.source: Verified from data/k8s_manifests/nginx-deployment.yaml which creates the 'nginx-web' Deployment, and setup_task.sh which modifies it.
Verified from data/k8s_manifests/namespaces.yaml and nginx-deployment.yaml which assign the deployment to the 'staging' namespace.
Verified from data/k8s_manifests/nginx-deployment.yaml and setup_task.sh which explicitly enforces that the current image of the container is 'nginx:1.25-alpine'.
Verified from the explicit task instructions in task.json and the pre-pull command in setup_task.sh which targets 'nginx:1.26-alpine'.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetically created Kubernetes workload within a Rancher environment. The target deployment is exactly 'nginx-web' within the 'staging' namespace. The initial container image is set to 'nginx:1.25-alpine', and the task explicitly requires upgrading the image to 'nginx:1.26-alpine', which exactly match the task description and setup scripts.
